ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom daily note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义的每日笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom weekly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义的每周笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom monthly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义的每月笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom quarterly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义的每季度笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom yearly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义的每年笔记设置！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: No periodic notes settings are enabled. You must turn on either the daily or weekly notes within the Periodic Notes plugin settings to be able to configure automatic tasks.
ast.target: 未启用任何周期性笔记设置。您必须在 Periodic Notes 插件设置中开启每日或每周笔记，才能配置自动任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download and enable the Tasks plugin to enable due date functionality within your tasks and TODOs.
ast.target: 下载并启用 Tasks 插件，以在任务和待办事项中启用截止日期功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The prefix to add to any carried over tasks, e.g. "[>]".
ast.target: 为任何结转的任务添加的前缀，例如 "[>]"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the header to be added to the top of the tasks section within new notes - include any markdown to set the heading style.
ast.target: 设置要添加到新笔记任务区顶部的标题——可包含任何 Markdown 以设置标题样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of headings within the notes to search and include any carry over tasks from. Leave this blank to search the entire note.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的笔记内标题列表，用于搜索并包含其中的结转任务。留空则搜索整篇笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Any newly discovered tasks will be added into the Kanban board you choose.
ast.target: 任何新发现的任务都会添加到你选择的看板中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is the Kanban board that will have tasks automatically added.
ast.target: 这是将自动添加任务的看板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select folders to ignore reading tasks from when syncing to the Kanban board.
ast.target: 选择在同步到看板时忽略读取任务的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter task names to ignore when syncing to the Kanban board. You can enter regular expression patterns, e.g. "^Meeting:"
ast.target: 输入在同步到看板时要忽略的任务名称。你可以输入正则表达式模式，例如 "^Meeting:"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download and enable the Kanban plugin to automatically sync tasks into your chosen Kanban board.
ast.target: 下载并启用看板插件，将任务自动同步到你选择的看板中。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: No periodic notes enabled
ast.target: 未启用周期性笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Tasks due date support
ast.target: 任务截止日期支持

ast.name: setName
ast.source: All tasks
ast.target: 所有任务

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Prefix for carried over tasks
ast.target: 结转任务前缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add due tasks
ast.target: 添加到期任务

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Heading(s) to search for tasks
ast.target: 用于搜索任务的标题

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Kanban board
ast.target: 看板

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Automatically synchronise tasks to Kanban board
ast.target: 自动将任务同步到看板

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Primary Kanban board
ast.target: 主看板

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Folder(s) to ignore
ast.target: 要忽略的文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Task name(s) to ignore
ast.target: 要忽略的任务名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Kanban support
ast.target: 看板支持

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to create new file.
ast.target: 无法创建新文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The Periodic Notes plugin must be installed and available for Auto Tasks to work.
ast.target: 必须安装并启用 Periodic Notes 插件，Auto Tasks 才能正常工作。

ast.name: header
ast.source: ## TODOs
ast.target: ## 待办

ast.source: Add entry
ast.target: 添加条目
